title: Moroccan Tile Stickers Vintage Style Wall Decals Waterproof Oil Proof for Kitchen Backsplash Bathroom Stairs Fireplace Table Terrace Subway Tile Sticker
features: Premium Eco Material: Heavy-metal free and formaldehyde free PVC material; durable crack-resistant surface with colourfast technology; fully waterproof construction.
Instant Peel and Stick: Hassle-free tile sticker application; clean with water or cloth; removable without wall damage for temporary transformations.
Time Saving Makeover: Renovate the kitchen or bathroom surface in minutes; DIY upgrades require no professional help and do not incur expensive construction costs.

Multi-Surface Versatility: Apply wall Decals to tiles; shower areas; doors; windows; appliances or wooden furniture.Help to beautify the walls and cover the dirty marks on the wall and will transform your kitchen; Bring you a personalized decorative style.
Pre-Installation Guidance: Measure existing tiles before purchase; apply to clean flat surfaces like ceramic; glass or finished wood.
